description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with four open shelves, each separated by horizontal panels. The structure is made from a medium-brown wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a warm and natural appearance. The sides are solid, while the front and back are open, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage for books, decorative objects, or other items commonly found in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative embellishments. The back panel is solid, reinforcing the structure and adding stability.
description: A tall, open wooden shelving unit with four evenly spaced shelves and a solid back panel, finished in a medium-brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the solid side panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel covering the entire height.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow side and shelf depth.
